name: web
description: SvelteKit frontend (customer + staff) for the booking system.

scripts.check: pnpm run paraglide && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.check:watch: pnpm run paraglide && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json --watch
scripts.test: echo 'no tests in web app yet'
scripts.test:coverage: echo 'no tests in web app yet'
